nameMeanings.name: Ainsworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Manchester named Ainsworth, from the Old English personal name Ægen + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
English (Yorkshire): in Yorkshire the name was a variant of, or confused with   Hainsworth  .

variants.name: Hainsworth
meanings: (Yorkshire): habitational name from Hainworth in Keighley, Yorkshire, named from the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. The intrusive -s- was acquired by the late 15th century, probably through false association with the Lancashire surname Ainsworth in 2 below.
variant of Ainsworth in Lancashire. Names such as de Haynesworth and de Heynesworth occur in the surrounding area in the 14th century.

nameMeanings.name: Jeremiah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘appointed by God’ in Hebrew; it was borne in the Bible by a Hebrew prophet of the 7th–6th centuries  bc , whose story, prophecies of judgement, and lamentations are recorded in the book of the Bible that bears his name. The Book of Lamentations is also attributed to him; it bewails the destruction of Jerusalem and the temple by the Babylonians in  587   bc . Despite (or because of) the gloomy subject matter of these texts, the name enjoyed some popularity among Puritans from the 16th century onwards and later Christian fundamentalists, partly perhaps because Jeremiah also preached reconciliation with God after his wrath was assuaged. Since the 1970s it has found considerable favour in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jeremiah Ainsworth was born in 1612, in Dean by Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Ainsworth, was 22 and his mother, Jane Rothwell, was 22. He had at least 1 son with Mary Worburton. He died in 1704, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeremiah Ainsworth(이)가 1612년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 디 비 번리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ainsworth(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Rothwell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Mary Worburton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1704년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.
